canonicalization: RFC 8785 JCS with null values preserved; byte-identical to aeoess/aps-conformance-suite fixtures/composition/a2a-1496-negative-paths/lib.ts canonicalizeJCS() on the value subset exercised by these fixtures (objects, arrays, strings, integers, ISO 8601 timestamps)
signature_scheme: Ed25519 over canonicalizeJCS(link minus signature) directly, no sha256 wrap; signature serialized as hex (128 chars)
field_name_convention: CTEF v0.3.2 §A: camelCase validityWindow with snake_case not_before/not_after; scope.action_categories array; chain-level max_depth; optional input.now for deterministic validity clock

fixture_intent.01-scope-expansion: INVALID_CLAIM_SCOPE on chain[1] after passing depth + validity (both links) + signature (both links) + scope (chain[0] is root, skipped)

fixture_intent.03-signature-substitution: INVALID_SIGNATURE on chain[1] after passing depth + validity (both links) + signature (chain[0])
fixture_intent.04-validity-expired: VALIDITY_EXPIRED on chain[0] after passing depth
